summary: Iteration 10 - Comprehensive testing of new Purchasing, Branch Orders, and Dashboard Backgrounds features. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all new pages and features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/suppliers - Returns suppliers list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/suppliers - Creates new supplier successfully
Backend: GET /api/purchase-orders - Returns purchase orders list (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/purchase-orders - Creates new purchase order successfully
Backend: GET /api/raw-materials - Returns raw materials list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/inventory/low-stock-alerts - Returns low stock alerts (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/branch-orders - Returns branch orders list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/branch-orders?type=outgoing - Returns outgoing orders (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/branch-orders?type=incoming - Returns incoming orders (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/branch-orders - Creates new branch order successfully
Backend: GET /api/dashboard-backgrounds - Returns 6 default backgrounds (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/dashboard-backgrounds/select - Selects background successfully
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants - Returns tenants list (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/super-admin/tenants/{id}/features - Returns tenant features (200 OK)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'المشتريات' (Purchasing) quick action icon
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'طلبات الفروع' (Branch Orders) quick action icon
Frontend: /purchasing page loads with stats cards (orders, pending, value, alerts)
Frontend: /purchasing page shows low stock alerts section with 3 alerts
Frontend: /purchasing page shows purchase orders list (PO-001, PO-002)
Frontend: /purchasing page has 'أوامر الشراء' and 'الموردين' tabs
Frontend: /purchasing page has 'مورد جديد' and 'أمر شراء' buttons
Frontend: /branch-orders page loads with stats cards (pending, approved, in_transit, delivered)
Frontend: /branch-orders page shows branch orders list (BO-001, BO-002, BO-003)
Frontend: /branch-orders page has 'الطلبات الصادرة' and 'الطلبات الواردة' tabs
Frontend: /branch-orders page has 'طلب جديد' button
Frontend: Super Admin panel shows 4 tenants with action buttons
Frontend: Super Admin features modal includes 'المشتريات والموردين' toggle
Frontend: Super Admin features modal includes 'طلبات الفروع' toggle
critical_code_review_comments: All new APIs (suppliers, purchase-orders, branch-orders, dashboard-backgrounds) working correctly
Frontend pages use mock/demo data when API fails - graceful fallback implemented
MOCKED DATA: Purchasing and Branch Orders pages display demo data when backend returns empty
New features properly integrated into Dashboard quick actions
Super Admin features modal includes new toggles for showPurchasing and showBranchOrders
seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers and purchase orders during testing (cleaned up)

mocked_features.purchasing_page: Uses demo data (suppliers, raw materials, purchase orders) when API returns empty
mocked_features.branch_orders_page: Uses demo data (branches, products, orders) when API returns empty

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 completed. New features tested: 1) Purchasing page (/purchasing) with suppliers, purchase orders, raw materials, and low stock alerts. 2) Branch Orders page (/branch-orders) with outgoing/incoming orders between branches. 3) Dashboard Backgrounds API for tenant customization. 4) Super Admin features modal now includes showPurchasing and showBranchOrders toggles. All APIs return 200 OK. Frontend pages use mock data as fallback when API returns empty arrays.
